title: pelargonium × involucratum
intro: Pelargonium × involucratum, also known as Rose Geranium or Geranium, is a species of flowering plant within the Geraniaceae family. The medicinal properties of Pelargonium × involucratum are attributed to its essential oils, which contain compounds like linalool, geraniol, and citronellol, known for their antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, PMS, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × involucratum include essential oil, tea, and tincture, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
